facebook.caption:
Under $10 a person. At a 4.8-star restaurant. On Trần Hưng Đạo road.

Bơ restaurant & coffee is doing something most spots on this island aren't. Real food, real coffee, real prices. 746 reviews back that up.

If you're staying anywhere near Phú Quốc town, this is your breakfast and lunch sorted. No guessing, no overpaying.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
